name: INFORM Risk Index
role: Country risk score, hazard and exposure, vulnerability, and lack of coping capacity.

name: WorldRiskIndex
publisher: Buendnis Entwicklung Hilft / IFHV Ruhr University Bochum
role: Independent disaster risk index with exposure, vulnerability, susceptibility, coping, and adaptation dimensions.

name: OECD CRS DRR-related ODA
publisher: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
role: Official development assistance commitments and disbursements for CRS purpose codes 74010, 41050, and 41010, using the latest detailed CRS year available to the pipeline. Detailed rows are grouped into DRR purpose categories from sector codes and available project text.

name: World Bank Projects & Operations DRM project search
role: Project-level examples and full commitment amounts for World Bank projects tagged or described around disaster risk management.

name: Green Climate Fund Open Data Library resilience project screen
role: Country-linked GCF project signals selected by resilience tags and text, including GCF funding, co-finance, public/private sector, entities, and beneficiaries.

name: OCHA FTS humanitarian response funding
role: Current-year humanitarian response funding by destination country, shown as a separate response-context layer.

name: GDACS current disaster alerts
publisher: European Commission Joint Research Centre / United Nations partners
role: Current disaster alerts by ISO3, alert level, event type, severity, and affected-population metadata. Used as an operational context signal, not a historical loss dataset.

name: World Bank World Development Indicators population and GDP
role: Population, GDP, and GDP per capita denominators used to calculate DRR ODA per person, DRR ODA as a share of GDP, disaster displacement per 100,000 people, and direct loss per person.

name: ThinkHazard
role: Screening-level hazard classifications for flood, earthquake, cyclone, heat, wildfire, tsunami, water scarcity, landslide, volcano, and related hazards.

name: World Bank indicator VC.IDP.NWDS
role: New internal displacements associated with disasters.

name: ND-GAIN Country Index
role: Climate adaptation score, vulnerability, and readiness.

name: Aqueduct 4.0 Country Rankings
role: Baseline water stress, river flood risk, drought risk, and future water-stress projections.

name: Our World in Data / EM-DAT disaster counts
role: Reported disaster counts by hazard type.

name: Our World in Data / EM-DAT economic damages
role: Global economic damage by disaster type.

name: Our World in Data / UNDRR Sendai indicators
role: Direct losses, national DRR strategy scores, and local government DRR strategy coverage.

name: EM-DAT official event export
role: Official event-level disaster loss records.

name: DesInventar / DELTA Resilience
role: Subnational disaster loss records where country databases are available.

name: ReliefWeb reports and disaster records
role: Humanitarian situation reports, appeals, assessments, and disaster metadata that can enrich recent-event context after API access is approved for the application.

name: IDMC Global Internal Displacement Database event records
role: Event-level disaster displacement records for hazard-specific displacement analysis. The current public atlas uses the World Bank/IDMC annual indicator while a stable automated event download is assessed.

name: IATI activity and transaction data
role: Potential activity-level view of mainstreamed DRR and humanitarian/development finance after de-duplication across reporting organisations and transaction hierarchies.

name: OCHA HPC humanitarian plans and requirements
role: Humanitarian Response Plan requirements, clusters, and plan-level appeal context that can complement OCHA FTS funding once plan and cluster mappings are normalized.

name: World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal
role: Historical and projected climate indicators for heat, precipitation, drought, and climate extremes that can add climate-stressor context to compound hazard pressure.

name: WorldPop gridded population exposure
role: High-resolution population denominators for exposure-weighted hazard overlays; useful for subnational profiles and for distinguishing population-at-risk from country totals.

name: NASA FIRMS active fire data
role: Near-real-time active fire and thermal anomaly signals for wildfire exposure and current-event monitoring after an API key is configured.

name: Copernicus GloFAS and Global Drought Observatory
publisher: Copernicus Emergency Management Service / European Commission JRC
role: Operational flood and drought monitoring and forecasts that can improve current hazard pressure beyond country-level static risk indices.

name: WMO public weather and climate warning evidence
role: Early-warning-system coverage, capability, and governance evidence where public country reporting is available.

name: GEM / OpenQuake seismic hazard and risk resources
geography: model grid, administrative area, and country
role: Seismic hazard and exposure models for countries where earthquake risk needs more detail than a high-level hazard screen.

name: Domestic public DRR budgets
role: Domestic DRR spending where governments publish budget tags, disaster funds, climate budget tagging, or Sendai-linked expenditure documents.

name: World Bank BOOST public expenditure data
geography: budget program, administrative unit, and country
role: Domestic public expenditure microdata where countries publish BOOST datasets; potential source for DRR-relevant budget screening when budget classifications are documented.

name: Private DRR and resilience finance
publisher: Climate funds, insurers, companies, banks, and project sponsors
role: Private-sector project and co-finance signals where public documents disclose resilience or DRR investment, not a complete total private finance measure.
